details.test: Task 1: Enroll 4-year-old in 6-week online small-group Tuesday program (add to cart, pay in full)
Task 2: Select educator PD package (>=3 coaching calls, < $600) and book intake call
Task 3: Submit custom learning plan request for 5-year-old with goals and budget
Task 4: Save free counting & shapes activities for 3-year-old to Favorites
Task 5: Reserve 90-minute in-person parent workshop near ZIP 10001 for 2 adults
Task 6: Add 12-week number sense & patterns curriculum bundle (<$350, 5 teachers) to cart
Task 7: Schedule 4-session weekly 1:1 online coaching package for kindergartener
Task 8: Subscribe to newsletter with weekly, ages 3-4, parent tips & free activities
Task 9: Save most popular recent math anxiety article mentioning preschool/young children to Reading List
